title: DartBot
seoTitle: Game of Darts DartBot | BarkinMad Studios
description: Learn how DartBot appears in Match play, how access is unlocked, and how the current DartBot level setting is exposed.
summary: DartBot is the app's AI opponent path for Match play, gated by Pro, DartBot, 48-hour access, or development access.
heroImageAlt: Placeholder artwork for pending Game of Darts DartBot image
sourceNotes: Derived from AppSettings, PlayerManager, GameSetups, SettingsView, and Ads-And-IAP central documentation.
Detailed DartBot scoring model is To Verify.

sections.heading: Access
paragraphs: DartBot appears as a bot player option for Match play. Source gates DartBot unless Pro, DartBot-only unlock, 48-hour access, or development access is active.
The in-app copy describes DartBot as a solo match opponent.

sections.heading: AI level
paragraphs: The DartBot level is stored in the `dartAILevel` setting and defaults to 5. The Settings view shows a DartBot level slider when DartBot-related access is available.
Game setup names the generated bot player as `DartBot Lvl {level}`.
